allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); Object.keys\(p.dependencies\).filter\(k => k.includes\('tiptap'\)\).forEach\(k => console.log\(k, p.dependencies[k]\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); ['lowlight','highlight.js'].forEach\(k => console.log\(k, p.dependencies[k] || 'not installed'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('version:', p.version, '\\nname:', p.name, '\\ndescription:', p.description || 'none'\)")
